page_title: List of blades (Attack on Titan Game)
text:
Blades consist of the player's primary weapons in Attack on Titan. They are rated by Sharpness (the damage they do), Blade Length (how far away a player can attack), and Durability (how many attacks can be made before they must be replaced).

Blades can be further fortified for additional Sharpness and Durability.
